类 SpringMVCRequestMappingHandler

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.handler.SpringMVCRequestMappingHandler
所有已实现的接口:
IRequestMappingHandler, IWebSocketRequestHandler
public class SpringMVCRequestMappingHandler extends Object implements IRequestMappingHandler, IWebSocketRequestHandler
Spring MVC RequestMapping Handler

  • 构造器详细资料

    • SpringMVCRequestMappingHandler

      public SpringMVCRequestMappingHandler()

  • 方法详细资料

    • handle

      public RequestMapping handle(ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, String controllerBaseUrl, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations, RequestMappingFunc requestMappingFunc)
      从接口复制的说明: IRequestMappingHandler
      Handles the request mapping for a given method.
      指定者:
      handle 在接口中 IRequestMappingHandler
      参数:
      projectBuilder - Project documentation configuration builder
      controllerBaseUrl - Base URL of the controller
      method - The JavaMethod object representing the method to handle
      frameworkAnnotations - Framework annotations related to the method
      requestMappingFunc - Function to process request mappings
      返回:
      The processed RequestMapping object
